There are experimental annotations to these terms by the following groups: BHF-UCL (5), ComplexPortal (52), HGNC-UCL (1), MGI (7), PINC (4), ParkinsonsUK-UCL (4), RGD (7), SGD (15), UniProt (12), dictyBase (1), FlyBase (8), SynGO (10), WB (1), DisProt (1), SynGO-UCL (2). There are no InterPro2GO/UniRule/UniProtKW mappings to these terms. GO:0016081 and GO:0099148 are included in the goslim_synapse subset. Annotations can be viewed here: https://github.com/geneontology/go-annotation/issues/6379 Annotations can be transferred to GO:0160321 vesicle docking activity or GO:7770062 vesicle membrane tethering activity. For GO:0099148 regulation of synaptic vesicle docking, GO:0016082 synaptic vesicle priming or a regulation of exocytosis term may be more appropriate depending on the gene product. Any comments can be added to the issue: https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/31880 Unless objections are received by 2026-05-29, we will assume that you agree to this change. Thanks, The GO-Ontology Editors --- A few notes on the draft (not part of the email): - **Annotation counts**: the per-group breakdown is taken verbatim from the annotation review ticket (geneontology/go-annotation#6379), which was scoped to the original 9 terms. If you want a precise total I can pull updated per-group counts, otherwise the editors may want to fold GO:0099148 into the same review. - **Transfer target correction**: the original notice (#1152) and go-annotation#6379 listed "GO:0099023 vesicle tethering activity", but GO:0099023 is `vesicle tethering complex` (a cellular_component). The correct MF is GO:7770062 `vesicle membrane tethering activity`. I've used the corrected ID in the draft, consistent with the fix @hattrill flagged and you confirmed. - **Comment deadline** is set to two weeks out (2026-05-29) — adjust as you see fit. - The terms are not yet obsoleted on master; PR #32073 (the obsoletion edits, incl.
